title: 订单倒挂分析
description: 分析有订单但未完成交货的积压情况，识别倒挂集中区域与客户

kpis.label: 未完成订单数
kpis.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as v FROM sales_order WHERE strftime('%Y%m', order_crt_date)='202603' AND order_dlvry_sts_code != 'C'
kpis.help: 本月创建且交货状态非完成的订单数

kpis.label: 未交货量（吨）
kpis.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(order_qty_mt), 1) as v FROM sales_order WHERE strftime('%Y%m', order_crt_date)='202603' AND order_dlvry_sts_code != 'C'
kpis.help: 未完成交货订单的总订单量

kpis.label: 倒挂率
kpis.sql: SELECT ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN order_dlvry_sts_code != 'C' THEN 1 END)*100.0/NULLIF(COUNT(*),0),1) as v FROM sales_order WHERE strftime('%Y%m', order_crt_date)='202603'
kpis.help: 未完成订单数占总订单数的比例

kpis.label: 零交货订单数
kpis.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as v FROM sales_order WHERE strftime('%Y%m', order_crt_date)='202603' AND order_dlvry_sts_code = 'A'
kpis.help: 交货状态为A（未开始）的订单数

stages.title: 产线倒挂分布
stages.description: 各产线的订单倒挂数量与未交货量
stages.sql: SELECT order_prodctnline_descrptn as 产线, COUNT(*) as 倒挂订单数, ROUND(SUM(order_qty_mt),1) as 未交货量_吨, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN order_dlvry_sts_code='A' THEN order_qty_mt ELSE 0 END),1) as 零交货量_吨, ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN order_dlvry_sts_code='A' THEN 1 END)*100.0/NULLIF(COUNT(*),0),1) as 零交货占比_pct FROM sales_order WHERE strftime('%Y%m', order_crt_date)='202603' AND order_dlvry_sts_code != 'C' GROUP BY order_prodctnline_descrptn ORDER BY 未交货量_吨 DESC
stages.insight_focus: 哪条产线倒挂最严重？零交货占比是否过高？

stages.title: 分公司积压
stages.description: 各分公司未完成订单的积压情况
stages.sql: SELECT order_brnch_descrptn as 分公司, COUNT(*) as 倒挂订单数, ROUND(SUM(order_qty_mt),1) as 未交货量_吨, ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN order_dlvry_sts_code='A' THEN 1 END)*100.0/NULLIF(COUNT(*),0),1) as 零交货率_pct FROM sales_order WHERE strftime('%Y%m', order_crt_date)='202603' AND order_dlvry_sts_code != 'C' GROUP BY order_brnch_descrptn ORDER BY 未交货量_吨 DESC
stages.insight_focus: 哪些分公司积压最多？是否与物流产能相关？

stages.title: 客户维度
stages.description: 按客户分析倒挂订单分布，识别重点客户风险
stages.sql: SELECT order_customer_descrptn as 客户, order_brnch_descrptn as 分公司, COUNT(*) as 倒挂订单数, ROUND(SUM(order_qty_mt),1) as 未交货量_吨 FROM sales_order WHERE strftime('%Y%m', order_crt_date)='202603' AND order_dlvry_sts_code != 'C' GROUP BY order_customer_descrptn, order_brnch_descrptn ORDER BY 未交货量_吨 DESC LIMIT 20
stages.insight_focus: 哪些客户倒挂量最大？是否存在大客户交付风险？

summary_prompt: 根据以上订单倒挂分析数据（产线倒挂、分公司积压、客户维度），请以供应链管理视角总结：1)倒挂最严重的产线和分公司，2)关键风险客户，3)建议的2个优先行动项。不超过150字。
